pr_title: feat: let users find account labels for first-class providers (closes AB-000)
label: incorrect_implementation
label_reason: Frontend called old /items endpoint instead of renamed /accounts, and PaginatedItems interface used wrong field name

issues.description: Frontend calls old /items endpoint URL instead of renamed /accounts. The fetchAccountLabel function requests /v1/providers/${providerId}/items but the backend endpoint was renamed to /v1/providers/${provider_id}/accounts, causing a 404 error and silent failure.
PaginatedItems interface uses `items` field but backend PaginatedAccounts model returns data under `accounts`. This causes response.items to be undefined and .find() to throw a TypeError.

expected_review.raw_review_body: Devin Review found 5 potential issues. View 4 additional findings in Devin Review.

pr_title: fix: keyerror for experiments with attachments [LSO-2079]
label: incorrect_implementation
label_reason: Batch endpoint missing _resolve_presigned_attachments call, so Go experiment attachments broken in non-streaming mode

issues.description: Batch endpoint missing _resolve_presigned_attachments. The stream handler was updated to call await _resolve_presigned_attachments(example.attachments) to convert Go-originated {presigned_url, mime_type, storage_url} format into {data, mime_type}, but the batch handler (internal_batch_examples_handler) at lines 162-173 still merges raw attachments directly into inputs without resolving them. This breaks attachments from Go experiments in non-streaming mode.

expected_review.raw_review_body: Devin Review found 1 potential issue. View 4 additional findings in Devin Review.

pr_title: fix: add gh cli to install script for forge [closes LSA-000]
label: incorrect_implementation
label_reason: GITHUB_REPO env var added but missing from Appendix A environment variables table in the agent prompt
notes: Devin left 3 reviews across 3 commits (0286ff6, cf43e5a, 866f949). This eval uses the first review — each subsequent review found a new related issue as the author pushed fixes.

issues.description: GITHUB_REPO is added as a new env var (handler.go:336) and referenced in the setup verification step (CLAUDE.md:69), but the Appendix A environment variables reference table (lines 367-372) was not updated to include it. The agent is instructed to use a variable not documented in the reference table.
